query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, passwordHash, emailVerified, refCode)
VALUES (
  'leego972-admin-owner',
  'Lee',
  'leego972@gmail.com',
  'email',
  'admin',
  '$2b$10$placeholder_hash_for_oauth_login',
  true,
  'LEEGO'
);

SET @uid = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO credits (userId, balance, lifetimeTotal, plan)
VALUES (@uid, 999999, 999999, 'unlimited');

SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, c.balance, c.plan 
FROM users u 
JOIN credits c ON c.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.email = 'leego972@gmail.com';
